quality.rationale: 正交标架法求黎曼张量需多步Cartan结构方程推导，具有一般球对称时空可迁移性且物理背景真实，但因解题文本截断导致完整度较低

origin.question: Problem 9.20. Compute the Riemann tensor of the following metric in an orthonormal frame:$$\begin{array}{l} \mathrm {d s}^{2} = - \mathrm {e}^{2 \alpha} \mathrm {d t}^{2} + \mathrm {e}^{2 \beta} \mathrm {d r}^{2} + \mathrm {e}^{2 \gamma} (\mathrm {d} \theta^{2} + \sin^{2} \theta \mathrm {d} \phi^{2}) \\ \alpha , \beta , \gamma = \text {f u n c t i o n s} \mathrm {r}, \mathrm {t}. \\ \end{array}$$What is the Ricci tensor for this metric? The scalar curvature? The Einstein tensor?## Solution
